options.name: -clock_timing
options.description: Specifies that slack is to be reported for clock style checks.

options.name: -early
options.description: Specifies the mode for which slack is to be reported.

options.name: -late
options.description: Specifies the mode for which slack is to be reported.

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Specifies the output be reported in tcl list format

options.name: -view
options.description: Specifies the analysis view in which to query the object attribute (string, optional) > <file_name> # Redirect output to file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <file_name> # Redirect output to file
